name: Cisco Systems, Inc.
description: Cisco Systems, Inc. is a global leader in networking, security, and collaboration technologies. The company designs, manufactures, and sells Internet Protocol-based networking products and services related to the communications and information technology industry. Cisco's portfolio includes switching, routing, wireless, and security solutions, as well as software-defined networking and cloud-based services. By providing the foundational infrastructure for the internet and enterprise networks, Cisco enables businesses to connect, communicate, and collaborate securely, while increasingly focusing on software-driven solutions and artificial intelligence to enhance network performance and security.
